title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ISRO

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ISRO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
